text:
With the excitement of the Paris Olympics well underway, attention has turned to the eligible athletes who are causing a stir on dating apps. So much so that one single lady has discovered a clever hack to track down the hunky Olympic athletes, in the hope of securing a match, even if they're not in Paris.

The 2024 Olympics got off to a flying start with Team GB scooping up medals in the men's synchronized diving, thanks toTom Daleyand Noah Williams, while Adam Peaty also secured silver in the 100m breaststroke. While Tom is married toDustin Lance Blackand Adam isdatingGordon Ramsay's daughter, Holly, fans have found a bundle of eligible bachelors residing in the Olympic Village.

One TikTok user revealed a nifty hack to bag a date with an athlete, as she told her fellow singletons to change the location on their Tinder dating app. User, Lydia Victoriia, who hails from the UK, shared the video with the caption: "For all the single girlies YOU NEED TO DO THIS NOW!!!"

She filmed herself pulling different facial expressions, to the songLet Me Think About It by Ida Corr & Fedde Le Grand, and revealed what Olympic fans needed to do. She wrote: "Single girlies stop what your doing, right now.

"The Olympics are on... And you need to do this right now... thank me later!"Victoriia then shared a screen recording as she changed her location on Tinder to "D1 93200 saint-denis france" - seemingly the address for the Olympic Village in Paris.

As she hit search a flurry ofOlympic athletesappeared on her Tinder app as potential matches, from UK hunks to USA hotties. The TikTok video scooped up a whopping 1.6M views and a sea of comments followed as other singletons begged for a reality TV dating show to be made from the Olympic Village.

One commented: "SOMEONE MAKE ALOVE ISLANDSTYLE REALITY SHOW IN THE OLYMPIC VILLAGE RN!!!" A second penned: "oh my GOD this is such a good idea."

"GIRL YOU WERE RIGHT ILY", a third gushed. Another also wrote: "I married an Olympic medalist and I highly highly recommend it, go girlies."

The official account for Tinder even shared their input as they wrote: "we see you" with an emoji wearing sunglasses. Others joked: "can’t wait to be ghosted by a Olympic medallist", while a second added: "Great now I can be ignored by someone with a gold medal."

Victoriia replied to some of the comments and said she had matched "with quite a few" and "felt so amazing" after one penned: "The way my ego would boost if an Olympian swiped right on me". Someone else shared: "Actually off to Paris to see my tinder match."

"This is by far the smartest thing I’ve ever seen", penned one Olympic fan. Another shared their experience and wrote: "I did this for Tokyo & met the love of my life who ghosted me when he went back to Sweden."

However, some explained that it was a "premium feature" on Tinder and to change the settings needed to pay. "Wait isn't that a premium feature", one asked, before another said: "Mine says it’s a premium feature and I have to pay."

Others didn't have much luck in finding eligible athletes as one penned: "It’s not working for me! I can’t find any Olympians!!" But it seemed well worth the video as single ladies said they'd "definitely "pay for the feature" and joked about booking their ticket to Paris "right now".

title: 'I changed my Tinder location to the Olympic Village to try and bag hunky athletes' - OK! Magazine
author: Amy Jones
description: One Olympic fan, who is looking for love, discovered a clever hack on how to match with a hunky athlete currently residing in Paris, despite being living in the UK
